summary: AgentForge v4.5 'SHOULDN'T EXIST' UPDATE testing complete. All 8 new features tested: (1) Goal Loop - autonomous run-until-done with quality thresholds, (2) Global Knowledge Graph - cross-project intelligence, (3) Multi-Future Build - parallel architecture exploration, (4) Autonomous Refactor Engine - auto code improvement, (5) Mission Control - real-time agent activity feed, (6) Deployment Pipeline - CI/CD with auto-deploy, (7) Self-Expansion Modules - system creates its own tools, (8) Idea-to-Reality Pipeline - one-click from concept to deployed product. Backend: 24/24 tests passed. Frontend: All 11 Command Center sub-tabs render correctly with proper data-testid attributes and action buttons.
passed_tests: ✅ API version is 4.5.0 with 41 features total
✅ POST /api/goal-loop/{project_id}/start - runs autonomous loop with cycles, returns metrics (tests_pass_rate, performance_score, code_quality, demo_playable)
✅ GET /api/goal-loop/{project_id} - lists goal loops
✅ GET /api/goal-loop/{project_id}/active - returns active loop
✅ POST /api/knowledge/add - adds knowledge entry to global graph
✅ GET /api/knowledge/stats - returns total_entries, total_reuses, by_type, by_category
✅ GET /api/knowledge/all - lists all knowledge entries
✅ GET /api/knowledge/search - searches knowledge by query
✅ POST /api/knowledge/extract/{project_id} - extracts patterns from project
✅ POST /api/explore/{project_id}/start - returns 3 architecture variants (Microservices, Monolith, Serverless)
✅ GET /api/explore/{project_id} - lists explorations
✅ POST /api/refactor/{project_id}/scan - detects inefficiencies, code_smells, performance_issues
✅ GET /api/refactor/{project_id} - lists refactor jobs
✅ GET /api/mission-control/{project_id}/status - returns agent statuses (COMMANDER, ATLAS, FORGE, SENTINEL, PROBE, PRISM)
✅ GET /api/mission-control/{project_id}/feed - returns event feed
✅ POST /api/mission-control/{project_id}/event - adds event to feed
✅ POST /api/pipeline/{project_id}/create - creates deployment pipeline with 5 stages
✅ GET /api/pipeline/{project_id} - lists pipelines
✅ POST /api/modules/create - creates self-expanding system module
✅ GET /api/modules - lists active modules
✅ POST /api/modules/auto-generate/{project_id} - auto-detects patterns and creates modules
✅ POST /api/reality-pipeline/start - runs full idea-to-deployed pipeline with 9 phases, returns deploy_url
✅ GET /api/reality-pipeline - lists reality pipelines
✅ Frontend: Command tab renders CommandCenter with data-testid='command-center'
✅ Frontend: All 11 sub-tabs present: Mission, Goal Loop, Idea→Reality, Knowledge, Autopsy, Debug, Time, Ideas, SaaS, Farm, Agents+
✅ Frontend: MissionControlPanel renders with LIVE badge and agent status row
✅ Frontend: GoalLoopPanel renders with 'Run Until Done' button and goal input (data-testid='goal-input', 'start-loop-btn')
✅ Frontend: RealityPipelinePanel renders with 'Make It Real' button and idea input (data-testid='idea-input', 'start-pipeline-btn')
✅ Frontend: KnowledgeGraphPanel renders with 'Extract Patterns' button (data-testid='extract-knowledge-btn')
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (fixed SystemModule model - added default value for frequency_trigger)
seed_data_creation: Test knowledge entries, system modules, goal loops, and reality pipelines created with TEST_ prefix during testing

Total features: 41. All endpoints working correctly.
